stemHtml: While in contact with Barcelona control and cruising at FL350, an aircraft with the call sign "Jetsun 1154" is passing the BCN VOR, when suddenly there is a rapid depressurisation. If possible, the correct way to communicate this situation to ATC is...

options.a: Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, Barcelona Control, Jetsun 1154, descending to FL100, depressurisation problem, overhead BCN VOR, passing FL340 descending.
options.b: Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, Barcelona Control, Jetsun 1154, descending FL100, depressurisation problem.
options.c: Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, Barcelona Control, Jetsun 1154, depressurisation problem, descending FL100, overhead BCN VOR, leaving FL350, heading 050.
options.d: Mayday, Mayday, Mayday, Barcelona Control, Jetsun 1154, passing FL340, descending to FL100, depressurisation problem, overhead BCN VOR, Mayday.
